title: Shadow Chat Update Notes
summary: Shadow Chat now rotates legacy medals to the next eligible holder when the primary admin leads a board.

sections.heading: New
items: Shado Pin, Shadow Checkers, and Shadow War medals now skip the primary admin.
When the admin would be first place, the medal is automatically assigned to the next eligible user.
Leaderboards now show the medal beside the actual assigned holder instead of assuming it belongs to the first row.

sections.heading: Smarter Tracking
items: Shadow Chat records who has seen, dismissed, acknowledged, or restarted for each release.
Update notes do not keep popping up after a user has already read that release.
Release notes are stored outside chat messages so Shado posts are no longer needed for app-update announcements.
